response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) that directly matches the role. Strong background in testing/TDD culture, multiple languages, and cloud/container tooling. Main gaps are limited explicit Nest.js and Kotlin/Java experience in recent roles, and React exposure appears secondary to Ember.js in much of the career history.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent/MCP work directly relevant to the role
Strong testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops on testing)
Polyglot engineer with proven ability to pick the right tool — JS/TS, Java, C++, DLang, Python-adjacent — plus Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, MongoDB
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned; framework fit needs validation
React experience present but lighter than Ember.js across career; recency of heavy React work unclear
Kotlin not mentioned anywhere in the resume; Java experience is older (Altom, ~2018)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stated stack
